fields.helpText: The date and time of when the entry was added to the file.
The Patient of this transmission entry.
This field contains the IEN of the PATIENT INSURANCE multiple (file 2,  sub-file .312) this entry is for.
The status of the patient - inpatient or outpatient.
The Ward location for inpatients, null for outpatients.
The Clinic for outpatients, null for inpatients.

Date of the event for this entry. Contains admission date/time (internal  FM format) for inpatients or appointment date/time (internal FM format) for outpatients. Can contain date range in [internal FM date/time]-[internal FM date/time] format.

fields.setOfCodes: 01:IN PROGRESS;02:AWAITING RESPONSE;03:UNABLE TO SEND;04:NEGATIVE RESPONSE RECEIVED;05:POSITIVE RESPONSE RECEIVED;06:MANUALLY REMOVED;07:PENDING RESPONSE RECEIVED;08:FLAGGED FOR NEXT REVIEW;0:INITIAL ENTRY;09:215 INQ SENT;
fields.helpText: The code describing current status of the entry.
The User who marked this entry as "in progress".
The Date/time this entry was marked as 'in progress'.
The name of the person who will be the Contact for any UMO questions.
This is the HL7 message control number that is generated at the time the  HL7 message is created and placed in the outgoing HL7 message queue.
This field contains the pointer to the 278 inquiry this response  corresponds to. If this entry is an inquiry, this field should be blank.
This field contains the pointer to the 278 response for this inquiry.
This is the date and time response was received (if this entry is a  response) or inquiry was sent out (if this entry is an inquiry).
If the source of the event is an appointment, this is internal FileMan  date/time of the appointment.  If the source of the event is an  admission, this is the internal FileMan date of the admission.

A value of 'D' will prevent this entry from being shown on the HCSR  worklist until the admission related to the entry has been discharged.   The 'D' option is only valid for entries with an Input/Output value of  'I'. Otherwise this is an internal FileMan date and the entry will begin to appear on the worklist on this date.
If the entry was created from the Response Worklist, the value of this  field is 1.

A flag that determines if a 278X215 Inquiry transaction has been generated for this entry. This 215 version of the 278 transaction could have been generated manually or via the auto-trigger controlled by the IB SITE PARAMETERS definition for auto trigger of 215 for appointments or admissions.
This field value identifies the entry as either an X12 278X217 transaction, or an X12 278X215 transaction, or an X12 278 response.
This field is set to 1 when a user marks the Response on the Response  Worklist as In-Progress.  It is set to 0 when a user removes the  In-Progress mark.
Determines if a response entry was manually removed from the Response Worklist and should not be displayed.
The timestamp of when an entry was manually removed from the worklist. A manually removed entry will no longer appear on the HCSR Worklist or the HCSR Response Worklist.
The user who manually removed an entry from the HCSR Worklist or the HCSR Response Worklist.
The Delete Reason Code is the reason for which the 278 request or inquiry  was removed from the HCSR Worklist.
This flag is set automatically when a 278x215 Authorization Inquiry is  generated manually.

fields.setOfCodes: 0:NO REQUEST CREATED FROM RESPONSE;1:REQUEST CREATED FROM THIS RESPONSE;
fields.helpText: This field indicates whether a request message was created from this  response message.  This is required in order to prevent duplicate  requests being generated from one response message.
User comments for this entry.
The Request Type for this Patient Event review that is being submitted  for approval (e.g. Admission Review, Health Services Review, Individual  or Specialty Care Review).
This is Certification Type of the HCSR Transmission entry.
The Service Type field is REQUIRED unless you plan to enter Service Detail information.

fields.setOfCodes: A:Uniform Billing Claim Form Bill Type;B:Place of Service Codes for Professional or Dental Services;
fields.helpText: The Service Location Qualifier field is REQUIRED unless you plan to enter Service Detail information.
Select the Service Location where this patient event will be performed.

fields.setOfCodes: 1:Hospital - Inpt or Opt (includes clinics);2:Skilled Nursing (NHCU);3:Home Health Agency;7:Clinic (only independent/satellite);8:Spec. Facility Hosp/Amb Surg Ctr;
fields.helpText: This is location of care code for the 278 inquiry. This field is only populated if the FACILITY TYPE QUALIFIER field is set to A.
This is Bill Classification code for the 278 inquiry. This field is only populated if the FACILITY TYPE QUALIFIER field is set to A.
Select a cause related to this patient care event.
Select a cause related to this patient care event.
Select a cause related to this patient care event.
The state in which the auto accident occurred.  This is REQUIRED if the accident occurred out of this state.
The country in which the auto accident occurred if outside the US.
The Level of Service if care is other than Routine. This is REQUIRED if this request is an Appeal.
The Health Condition Code is only entered if it is a factor in choosing services that are not typical for the patient's diagnoses.
The Prognosis Code is only entered if it is a factor in choosing services that are not typical for the patient's diagnoses.

fields.setOfCodes: M:Prov has Limited or Restricted Ability to Release Data Related to Clm;Y:Prov has a Signed Statement Permitting Release of Medical Billing Data;
fields.helpText: The ROI code which determines how information of this patient event will be released.
The Delay Reason code.  This information is REQUIRED if this request is outside of the normal timeframe for this UMO.
Enter the date on which the accident occurred.
The Date of Last Menstrual Period if this request is related to pregnancy.
The Estimated Date of Birth if this request is related to an estimated date of birth (due date).
The date when the current symptoms or illness first began.
The patient discharge date/time for the 278 inquiry. Time is optional.
The Certification Issue Date for this authorization.
The authorization expiration date.
The Certification Effective Date for the authorization provided.
The date for which the authorization is still in effect.
This multiple contains patient diagnosis codes for 278 inquiry.
If the Certification Type is 4 - Extension, this is the number of additional visits. If the Certification Type is S - Revised, it is the new total.
The service unit count for the Health Care Services Delivery segment of the 278 inquiry.
The Unit of Measurement for the Sample Selection Modulus.
Enter a number with up to 2 decimal points that represents the sampling frequency in terms of the Unit of Measurement (e.g. 1.5 weeks).
The Time Period Qualifier for the Period Count when patient events must be rendered within a specific time frame.
Enter a whole number between 1 and 999 when patient events must be rendered within a specific time frame.
The Delivery Frequency Code when patient events must be rendered within a specific time frame.
The optional Delivery Pattern Time Code of when the services will be provided.
This field indicates existence of Ambulance Certification Condition(s).
The first of 5 possible Ambulance Certification Conditions.
The second of 5 possible Ambulance Certification Conditions.
The third of 5 possible Ambulance Certification Conditions.
The fourth of 5 possible Ambulance Certification Conditions.
The fifth of 5 possible Ambulance Certification Conditions.
This field indicates existence of Chiropractic Certification Condition(s).
The first of 5 possible Chiropractic Certification Conditions.
The Second of 5 possible Chiropractic Certification Conditions.
The third of 5 possible Chiropractic Certification Conditions.
The fourth of 5 possible Chiropractic Certification Conditions.
The fifth of 5 possible Chiropractic Certification Conditions.
This field indicates existence of Durable Medical Equipment (DME) Certification Condition(s).
The first of 5 possible DME Certification Conditions.
The second of 5 possible DME Certification Conditions.
The third of 5 possible DME Certification Conditions.
The fourth of 5 possible DME Certification Conditions.
The fifth of 5 possible DME Certification Conditions.
This field indicates existence of Oxygen Therapy Certification condition(s).
The Certification Condition code that describes the need for Oxygen Therapy.  You can enter up to five Condition codes.
The Certification Condition code that describes the need for Oxygen Therapy.  You can enter up to five Condition codes.
The Certification Condition code that describes the need for Oxygen Therapy.  You can enter up to five Condition codes.
The Cerfication Condition code that describes the need for Oxygen Therapy.  You can enter up to five Condition codes.
The Certification Condition code that describes the need for Oxygen Therapy.  You can enter up to five Condition codes.
This field indicates existence of Functional Limitation Certification Condition(s).
The Certification Condition code that describes the patient's Functional Limitations.  You can enter up to five Condition Codes.
The Certification Condition code that describes the patient's Functional Limitations.  You can enter up to five Condition Codes.
The Certification Condition code that describes the patient's Functional Limitations.  You can enter up to five Condition Codes.
The Certification Condition code that describes the patient's Functional Limitations.  You can enter up to five Condition Codes.
The Certification Condition code that describes the patient's Functional Limitations.  You can enter up to five Condition Codes.
This field indicates existence of Activities permitted certification condition(s).
The Certification Condition Code that represents the defined patient activities permitted.  You can enter up to five Condition Codes.
The Certification Condition Code that represents the defined patient activities permitted.  You can add up to five Condition Codes.
The Certification Condition Code that represents the defined patient activities permitted.  You can add up to five Condition Codes.
The Certification Condition Code that represents the defined patient activities permitted.  You can add up to five Condition Codes.
The Certification Condition Code that represents the defined patient activities permitted.  You can add up to five Condition Codes.
This field indicates existence of Mental Status Certification Condition(s).
The Certification Condition Code that represents the patient's mental status.  You can add up to five Condition Codes.
The Certificaton Condition Code that represents the patient's mental status.  You can add up to five Condition Codes.
The Certification Condition Code that represents the patient's mental status.  You can add up to five Condition Codes.
The Certification Condition Code that represents the patient's mental status.  You can add up to five Condition Codes.
The Certification Condition Code that represents the patient's mental status.  You can add up to five Condition Codes.
The optional Admission Type that describes the type of inpatient admission.
The an optional Admission Source that decribes the source of the inpatient admission.
The optional Patient Status which describes the current status of the patient.
The Nursing Home (SNF) Residential status is required when the patient is currently in or eligible for a  nursing home.
Enter a 1-9 digit whole number.  This is REQUIRED when requesting certification for a specific number in a series of treatments.
Enter a 1-15 digit number.  This is REQUIRED when requesting certification for a specific number in a series of treatments.
The Subluxation Level code is REQUIRED if the treatment includes subluxation.
The Subluxation Level code is REQUIRED if treatment includes subluxation.

fields.setOfCodes: A:Acute Condition;C:Chronic Condition;D:Non-acute Condition;E:Non-Life Threatening;F:Routine;G:Symptomatic;M:Acute Manifestation of a Chronic Condition;
fields.helpText: The REQUIRED code that describes the current condition of the patient.
Determines whether or not complications indicators exist.
Enter a 1-80 character, free text description of the patient's condition.
Enter a 1-80 character, free text description of the patient's condition.
Determines wheter or not related X-Rays are available.
Select the type of Oxygen Equipment.  You can enter up to three Oxygen Equipment Types.
Select the type of Oxygen Equipment.  You can enter up to three Oxygen Equipment Types.
Select the type of Oxygen Equipment.  You can enter up to three Oxygen Equipment Types.
Enter an optional 1-80 character, free text description of why the oxygen equipment is needed.
Enter a numeric value representing the Oxygen Flow rate in liters/minute.
Enter a numeric value representing the number of times per day that the patient must use oxygen.
Enter a numeric value representing the number of hours per period of oxygen use.
Enter a 1-80 character, free text description of special orders for the Respiratory Therapist.
Enter a numerical value representing Arterial Blood Gas Quantity.
Enter a numerical value representing Oxygen Saturation Quantity.
The conditions under which the patient was tested.
The patient's Oxygen Test Findings.  You can enter up to three findings.
The patient's Oxygen Test Findings.  You can enter up to three findings.
The patient's Oxygen Test Findings.  You can enter up to three findings.
Enter a numeric value representing the Flow Rate for portable oxygen in liter/minute.
The prescribed form of Oxygen Delivery.
The date when the home health, private duty or nursing agency services started.
The date when home health care will start.
The Date when home health care will end.
The Medicare coverage indicator for the 278 inquiry.
The date on which surgery was performed.  This date should be entered if there was a surgery related to this home health care.
The Procedure Coding Method for the related surgical procedures.
The Surgical Procedure associated with this home health care.
The date on which the physician issued verbal orders for the start of home health care.
The date on which the patient was last seen by the physician.
The date on which the physician was last contacted by the home health services provider.
The Start Date of the last inpatient admission.
The End Date of the last inpatient admission.
The Facility Type that represents the location of the patient's last inpatient admission.
This multiple contains additional patient information (attachments) for  patient event level.
This is a free form message for 278 inquiry.
This multiple holds data related to patient event providers for 278  inquiry.
This multiple holds data related to patient event transport information  for 278 inquiry.
This multiple holds data related to patient event other UMO for 278  inquiry.
This multiple holds data related to each service line.
Enter the previous Authorization Number from the UMO that is associated with this patient event.
Enter the previous Administrative Reference Number from the UMO that is associated with this patient event.
THE code specifying the units in which a value is being expressed, or manner in which a measurement has been taken. (CR101)
Enter the patient's weight in pounds.
The type of ambulance transportation trip.

fields.setOfCodes: A:NEAREST FACILITY;B:PREFERRED PHYSICIAN;C:NEARNESS OF FAMILY;D:SPECIALIST OR SPECIAL EQUIP.;E:REHABILITATION FACILITY;F:RESIDENTIAL FACILITY;
fields.helpText: Enter a code here to indicate the reason why the patient was transported to a particular location.
This field indicates the units of the value expressed in the field Transport Distance.
This field represents the distance the patient was transported.
The text entered here should explain why a round trip was needed.  This field is REQUIRED when the Transport Code is Round Trip.
The text entered here should explain why a stretcher was needed.
The name of the UMO contact person.
The value entered here identifies the type of number entered in the field Contact Communication Number-1.
The value entered here identifies the type of number entered in the field Contact Communication Number-2.
The value entered here identifies the type of number entered in the field Contact Communication Number-3.
This is a 10 digit phone/FAX number (format: nnnnnnnnnn  or nnn-nnn-nnnn) or an email/URL address.
This is a 10 digit phone/FAX number (format: nnnnnnnnnn  or nnn-nnn-nnnn) or an email/URL address.
This is a 10 digit phone/FAX number (format: nnnnnnnnnn  or nnn-nnn-nnnn) or an email/URL address.
This note is available to provide additional information pertaining to  the removal of a 278 Request(217) or Inquiry(215) from the HCSR Worklist.
This multiple contains AAA segments data from 278 response.
Code indicating type of action.
Reference information as defined for a particular Transaction Set or as specified by the Reference Identification Qualifier.
Code indicating a code from a specific industry code list.
This field should be set to 'YES' if second surgical opinion is required.
This multiple contains TRN segments data.
This multiple contains data for HI segments.
